content.text:
This view is very clear. I can now confidently identify all the neighbour atoms of atom 16 (C). From the image, atom **C:16** has three covalent bonds connecting it to:

1. **C:15** — bonded above/to the right (Carbon)
2. **N:18** — bonded to the left (Nitrogen)
3. **O:17** — bonded below (Oxygen)

## Summary

| Neighbour Atom Index | Element |
|----------------------|---------|
| 15                   | C       |
| 17                   | O       |
| 18                   | N       |

**geomconf_index:** **4348** (from the filename `geomconf_4348.xyz`)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 16, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
